description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a rectangular display framed by a matte black bezel. The front features a wide, flat screen with a subtle brand logo centered on the lower bezel, and a small square button or indicator on the right side. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, rectangular pedestal stand with a broad, flat base, providing stability. The rear of the monitor is plain, with a single rectangular label or panel near the bottom, and no visible ports or controls. The side profile reveals the monitor's slim depth and the stand's solid, vertical support. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for office or public urban environments.
description: A flat, rectangular computer monitor with a matte black bezel, supported by a broad pedestal stand and featuring a centered brand logo on the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the monitor's slim profile and the rectangular pedestal stand's depth.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the wide screen, matte black bezel, centered brand logo, and a small button or indicator on the lower right bezel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim profile and stand depth seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain back panel with a single rectangular label or panel near the bottom, and no visible ports or controls.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is matte black, moderately thick, with straight edges and sharp corners, providing a simple, utilitarian frame around the display area. No decorative elements or color contrast are present.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a rectangular pedestal type with a broad, flat base and a vertical support column, all in matte black plastic, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A single small button or indicator is located on the lower right side of the front bezel, separated from the brand logo.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is present, centered on the lower front bezel, rendered in white text against the black bezel.
